mobile.title: Smart Air
mobile.stack: Java, XML, Firebase, Android Studio, Mockito
mobile.description: Developed a kid-friendly Android app for asthma management, with parent management and provider viewing. Led the project as Scrum Master and implemented robust testing and architecture patterns.
bullets: Selected among 30+ groups to work with an external partner organization (project showcase).
Designed an authentication workflow using MVP & SOLID principles to separate concerns and improve testability.
Achieved 100% presenter test coverage with 20+ JUnit/Mockito tests to ensure presenter reliability and maintainability.
Led Git-based development as Scrum Master: maintained Jira stories, ran scrums, and reviewed 8+ pull requests.

mobile.title: UniMap
mobile.description: Mobile app for student-run events, providing a hub to browse and upload campus events. Built with SwiftUI and Supabase for backend data management.
bullets: Managed event data using Supabase (Postgres) to support 20+ events and user accounts.
Applied MVVM architecture, lifecycle management, and dependency injection (EnvironmentObject) across 8+ views.
Implemented form validation, focus-state control, and dynamic styling for a robust event upload flow.

mobile.title: Calendrier
mobile.description: An iOS note-taking app combining text and drawing using SwiftData and PencilKit. Focused on accessibility and smooth, expressive UI interactions.
bullets: Used SwiftData for reliable local persistence of notes and drawing data.
Applied MVVM/MVC principles to separate UI, logic, and data for maintainability.
Implemented Core Animation and SwiftUI transitions to optimize responsiveness and user engagement.

webdev.title: WellGlobe | TerraHacks 25'
webdev.stack: React, FastAPI, Gemini AI, Google Maps API
webdev.description: Travel advisory prototype delivering real-time safety insights with an AI-integrated chatbot and geolocation. Built under a 36-hour hackathon to surface contextual safety guidance and vaccine checklists.
bullets: Delivered a travel advisory prototype providing real-time safety insights via an AI-integrated chatbot (Gemini) and geolocation (Google Maps API).
Developed a responsive and accessible user flow across 5+ pages with React, ensuring WCAG-compliant design.
Created 7+ RESTful endpoints in Python with FastAPI under a 36-hour Agile sprint, ensuring secure API integration.

webdev.title: Eatery Crit
webdev.stack: React (TypeScript), Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Flask, SQLite/SQLAlchemy, Redis
webdev.description: Secure full-stack restaurant review app with a responsive React frontend and Flask backend. Implemented user auth, ratings, and performant UI with Framer Motion and Tailwind CSS.
bullets: Built a secure full-stack web app for restaurant exploration and reviews using React (TypeScript) and Flask.
Designed and configured 10+ REST API endpoints to handle restaurant listings, reviews, and queries with SQL.
Optimized animations and UI responsiveness using Framer Motion and Tailwind CSS, enhancing UX flows.
Used Redis for caching to improve response latency for frequently-accessed listings.

other.title: Fireboy and Watergirl
other.description: Multithreaded 2D platformer implementing core mechanics, cooperative controls, collectible systems, and performant rendering using Java Swing and JavaFX.
bullets: Implemented a multithreaded 2D platformer with 50+ FPS real-time rendering and responsive controls.
Used Java Swing & JavaFX APIs with event-driven programming to improve responsiveness by ~30%.
Architected 10+ modular, extensible classes for players, levels, and entities to streamline future features.

other.title: Asynchronous Battleship Server
other.description: High-concurrency TCP server for Battleship built with low-level socket APIs and select() to manage many simultaneous clients efficiently.
bullets: Built a high-concurrency TCP server using sockets and select() to support 100+ simultaneous connections.
Applied low-level networking concepts and socket/port management to reliably handle client input and communication.
Implemented real-time signal handlers and descriptor flags to prevent blocking, reducing socket errors by 90%.

other.title: Low-level Tetris
other.description: A simplified Tetris implementation using MIPS-32 assembly, focusing on real-time piece movement, rotation, collision detection, and efficient low-level routines.
bullets: Implemented real-time piece movement, rotation, and collision detection using the MIPS-32 ISA.
Automated repetitive low-level routines (e.g., input polling) with the stack to streamline display rates by ~10%.
Applied computer architecture concepts by managing registers, memory, and control flow at the instruction level.
